# 402.pub

> Monetising APIs today means API keys, billing dashboards, and vendor lock-in.
> 402.pub is the open marketplace for paid APIs — a live directory that streams
> service announcements from Nostr relays, letting developers discover and pay for
> APIs with L402, x402, or Cashu, no registration required.

402.pub serves two audiences: **API operators** who want to monetise endpoints with
Lightning payments, and **agent builders** who want AI agents that autonomously
discover and pay for APIs. The site itself is a static HTML/CSS/JS page with no
backend — all data comes from Nostr kind 31402 events and external directories.

## Programmatic Access

AI agents and other discovery pages can consume 402.pub's aggregated data:

- **JavaScript API**: Call `window.get402Services()` from the page for structured JSON
- **Download**: Click "Download services.json" in the footer for a snapshot
- **MCP**: Use [402-mcp](https://github.com/forgesworn/402-mcp) (`npx 402-mcp`) for native tool-based access
- **Direct Nostr**: Subscribe to `kind: 31402` on relays listed below

## Data Sources

402.pub aggregates from multiple sources into a single unified directory:

| Source | Protocol | Scale | Update |
|--------|----------|-------|--------|
| Nostr relays (7 default) | L402, x402, Cashu | Real-time streaming | Live |
| l402.directory | L402 | ~6 curated | On page load |
| x402 Bazaar (Coinbase CDP) | x402 (USDC on Base) | ~14,000 resources | On page load |
| agent-commerce.store | L402 (Lightning) | ~48 endpoints | On page load |

## Service Metadata (kind 31402)

Each service listing includes:

- **name**: Human-readable service name
- **url**: API endpoint URL(s)
- **about**: Description of what the service does
- **pricing**: Per-capability pricing (amount + currency)
- **paymentMethods**: Supported payment rails (l402, x402, cashu)
- **topics**: Category tags for filtering
- **website**: Project homepage (optional, via content JSON)
- **docs**: Documentation URL (optional, via content JSON)
- **repository**: Source code URL (optional, via content JSON)
- **trustTier**: self-announced, discovered, or stale

## For API Operators

Gate any HTTP endpoint behind a paywall using toll-booth middleware, then announce
it on Nostr with 402-announce. Your service appears on 402.pub automatically.

- [toll-booth](https://github.com/forgesworn/toll-booth) — L402 paywall middleware for Express, Hono, or any HTTP framework
- [402-announce](https://github.com/forgesworn/402-announce) — Publish services on Nostr (kind 31402)
- [toll-booth-announce](https://github.com/forgesworn/toll-booth-announce) — Bridge from toll-booth config to Nostr

## For Agent Builders

Give your AI agent a wallet with 402-mcp. It discovers paid APIs on Nostr, pays
with L402, x402, or Cashu, caches credentials, and tracks spend with safety limits.

- [402-mcp](https://github.com/forgesworn/402-mcp) — MCP server for autonomous API discovery and payment

## Key Concepts

- **kind 31402** — Nostr replaceable event type for announcing paid API services
- **L402** — HTTP 402 Payment Required protocol using Lightning invoices as access tokens
- **pmi tags** — Payment method identifiers on service events (Lightning, Cashu, x402)
- **Service directory** — Live-streaming, filterable grid with health checks and search

## Optional

- [402.pub website](https://402.pub/)
- [toll-booth on npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@forgesworn/toll-booth)
- [402-mcp on npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/402-mcp)
- [402-announce on npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/402-announce)
